title: content.rs: detect_quote_links matches URLs inside existing <a> tags
description: detect_quote_links runs QUOTE_RE.find_iter(html) on raw HTML without skipping content inside existing ... spans. A post that contains an anchor tag linking to an AP post URL (e.g. a linkified mention URL or a plain link the user didn't intend as a quote) will get a FEP-e232 Link tag and quoteUrl added to the Note, incorrectly marking the post as a quote of that content. process_content has explicit skip_ranges logic for this purpose but detect_quote_links does not use it. Fix: apply the same in_link check used in process_content, or pass quote detection results through process_content rather than re-scanning the final HTML.
close_reason: Fixed: detect_quote_links skips URLs inside <a> tag spans.
